intentSynonyms: navigate a to checkout in pandaexpress
open the checkout page for a basket in pandaexpress
description: Sync a basket into the browser session and navigate to the checkout page. The user sees the payment page with their order ready — they only need to select a payment method and place the order. Call this after building a basket with add_product_to_basket.

restaurant_name.description: Restaurant name for display (auto-detected if omitted)

restaurant_ext_ref.description: Restaurant external reference number (auto-detected if omitted)
